messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "1c5f43cd-15d9-41c5-96e7-d6c17bfc130f", "article_id": "5f75220f-dd34-40fd-af73-702ca274bb4d", "source_name": "Marie Claire Taiwan", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "product_launch", "brand": "PUMA", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["運動品牌 PUMA 推出全新 H-STREET 鞋款，以輕盈腳感與俐落外型為核心", "並邀請 ROSÉ 搶先演繹鞋款魅力"], "anchor_json": {"event_date": "2026-03-26", "location": "台北", "confidence_basis": "article_publication_date", "brand": "PUMA"}}, {"event_frame_id": "31567276-ce7a-4600-a16a-bbf1d8a133c7", "article_id": "5f75220f-dd34-40fd-af73-702ca274bb4d", "source_name": "Marie Claire Taiwan", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "pop_up_event", "brand": "PUMA", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["PUMA 將於 4 月 3 日至 4 月 26 日進駐台北中山商圈，打造期間限定「H-STREET 潮流得來速」快閃空間", "活動日期：4月3日（五）— 4月26日（日）"], "anchor_json": {"start_date": "2026-04-03", "end_date": "2026-04-26", "daily_hours": "12:00-20:00", "brand": "PUMA"}}, {"event_frame_id": "6feecda9-92ff-44b7-bdeb-9a5257896643", "article_id": "5f75220f-dd34-40fd-af73-702ca274bb4d", "source_name": "Marie Claire Taiwan", "source_lang": "zh", "event_type": "celebrity_collaboration", "brand": "PUMA", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["作為 BLACKPINK 成員之一的 ROSÉ，其私下穿搭所帶動的薄底鞋風潮", "並邀請 ROSÉ 搶先演繹鞋款魅力"], "anchor_json": {"association_type": "品牌大使/代言人活動", "market": "台灣", "brand": "PUMA"}}]}
